data.title: GameStop Stock Is Moving Lower Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description: GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) shares are falling Thursday after the company announced a proposed private offering

data.title: RFK Jr. To Cut 10,000 Jobs, Shut Regional Agencies In Major Health Department Overhaul: Report
data.description: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is planning a major overhaul of his department, which includes the elimination of 10,000 jobs and shutting down regional offices.

data.title: KKR Mulls To Buy Japan-Based Eye Care Company Topcon
data.description: Japan's business reforms, growing investor activism, and a weak yen have made it easier for private equity firms like KKR to strike deals.

data.title: Investor With Surprise $1M Windfall Sparks Heated Debate: 'Why Not Park It All In SCHD For Dividend Income?' – Reddit Weighs In
data.description: Many investors find the benefits of dividends, such as money working for you and steady payouts, incredibly appealing.

data.title: Why Is Tesla's Chinese Rival NIO Stock Diving Today?
data.description: NIO shares decline amid news that White House announced new tariffs on auto imports. The company plans to offer 118.8 million shares to fund R&D and strengthen balance sheet.
